default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss content updates, performance reports, link building, and outreach campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/PaDvakuAQKWkN2NuxzHE75kR_DdfVMz4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is on track with 126 articles published, focusing on general use cases across sales, marketing, insurance, and document handling](https://fathom.video/share/PaDvakuAQKWkN2NuxzHE75kR_DdfVMz4?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Significant improvement in backlinks (101 referring domains, up from 53 last week) and positive performance of construction-related content](https://fathom.video/share/PaDvakuAQKWkN2NuxzHE75kR_DdfVMz4?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Outreach campaigns yielding results with 4 positive replies, highest so far, targeting agencies and financial advisors](https://fathom.video/share/PaDvakuAQKWkN2NuxzHE75kR_DdfVMz4?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Need for quick implementation of vertical/industry pages on the website, seeking web development assistance](https://fathom.video/share/PaDvakuAQKWkN2NuxzHE75kR_DdfVMz4?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)

## Topics

### Content Updates and Performance

  - [126 articles published, covering sales, marketing, insurance, and document handling](https://fathom.video/share/PaDvakuAQKWkN2NuxzHE75kR_DdfVMz4?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Construction case study and video content requests pending](https://fathom.video/share/PaDvakuAQKWkN2NuxzHE75kR_DdfVMz4?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Performance boost in clicks, particularly from older articles](https://fathom.video/share/PaDvakuAQKWkN2NuxzHE75kR_DdfVMz4?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [Construction-specific content showing promising results after two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/PaDvakuAQKWkN2NuxzHE75kR_DdfVMz4?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Considering adding insurance, sales, and infrastructure to industry-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/PaDvakuAQKWkN2NuxzHE75kR_DdfVMz4?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)

### Link Building Progress

  - [Significant increase in backlinks: 101 referring domains (up from 53 last week)](https://fathom.video/share/PaDvakuAQKWkN2NuxzHE75kR_DdfVMz4?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [19 active collaborations, with 14 already in place](https://fathom.video/share/PaDvakuAQKWkN2NuxzHE75kR_DdfVMz4?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
  - [Content strategy focusing on data-heavy articles and statistics to attract backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/PaDvakuAQKWkN2NuxzHE75kR_DdfVMz4?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)

### Outreach Campaigns

  - [4 positive replies received (highest so far)](https://fathom.video/share/PaDvakuAQKWkN2NuxzHE75kR_DdfVMz4?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [Targeting agencies, dev shops building AI agents, and financial advisors](https://fathom.video/share/PaDvakuAQKWkN2NuxzHE75kR_DdfVMz4?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [New campaign targeting 10,000 verified marketing agency contacts](https://fathom.video/share/PaDvakuAQKWkN2NuxzHE75kR_DdfVMz4?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
  - [$200 credit offer for replies to gauge interest and attribution](https://fathom.video/share/PaDvakuAQKWkN2NuxzHE75kR_DdfVMz4?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)

### Website Development

  - [Discussion about implementing vertical/industry pages](https://fathom.video/share/PaDvakuAQKWkN2NuxzHE75kR_DdfVMz4?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
  - [GrowthX exploring options to recommend web developers, but facing challenges in finding immediate solutions](https://fathom.video/share/PaDvakuAQKWkN2NuxzHE75kR_DdfVMz4?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Thiago to provide feedback on the quality of outreach contacts in the next week](https://fathom.video/share/PaDvakuAQKWkN2NuxzHE75kR_DdfVMz4?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
  - [GrowthX to explore web development options for implementing vertical/industry pages](https://fathom.video/share/PaDvakuAQKWkN2NuxzHE75kR_DdfVMz4?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [Continue content production focusing on high-performing categories](https://fathom.video/share/PaDvakuAQKWkN2NuxzHE75kR_DdfVMz4?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Expand outreach campaigns to marketing agencies](https://fathom.video/share/PaDvakuAQKWkN2NuxzHE75kR_DdfVMz4?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
  - [Follow up on pending video content and case study materials from Datagrid](https://fathom.video/share/PaDvakuAQKWkN2NuxzHE75kR_DdfVMz4?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)

action_items.description: Send requested videos (LinkedIn posts, YouTube, webinars) to GrowthX team
Set up page w/ all videos (social media, webinars) for GrowthX team access
Provide feedback next week on outreach conversations from forwarded contacts
Explore network for web devs to implement vertical/industry pages, report options
